content:
# AI Service Finder Response

A customer says: "I bought a used car and need to put it in my name." This response should guide them toward the likely registration transfer service while keeping eligibility and document advice cautious.

## Recommended Service

| Recommendation | Reason |
| --- | --- |
| Transfer vehicle registration | The intent mentions buying a used vehicle and changing the registered operator. |
| Check identity requirements | The buyer must prove identity before the transfer can proceed. |
| Check payment requirements | Transfer duty or fees may apply depending on vehicle and customer details. |

## Required Documents

| Item | Why it may be needed |
| --- | --- |
| Proof of identity | Confirms the buyer account. |
| Vehicle details | Identifies the registration record. |
| Seller/buyer declaration | Supports the transfer request. |
| Payment method | Required when transfer fees apply. |

## Confidence and Review Flags

| Signal | Assessment |
| --- | --- |
| Intent confidence | High |
| Human review | Required if ownership details conflict |
| Sensitive data | Do not display unrelated vehicle or seller records |

## Context Graph

```mermaid
graph LR
    Intent[Customer intent] --> Service[Transfer registration]
    Service --> Vehicle[Vehicle record]
    Service --> Buyer[Buyer identity]
    Service --> Seller[Seller details]
    Service --> Pay[Fees]
    Vehicle --> Policy[Eligibility rules]
    Policy --> Review[Human review]
```

## Safe Response Notes

- Present this as guidance, not a final eligibility decision.
- Link to the official transfer service before collecting sensitive details.
- Ask for only the minimum information needed to route the customer.
